title: Squirrel Removal in New Rochelle, NY | $900 – $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in New Rochelle, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving New Rochelle homes & businesses. Call today!
intro: New Rochelle homeowners know that squirrels are a year-round challenge, especially in neighborhoods with mature trees near Long Island Sound and downtown. Our professional squirrel removal services protect your attic, roof, and property from damage caused by these persistent pests. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective squirrel removal tailored to New Rochelle's unique mix of historic homes and modern residences.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Westchester County, our licensed technicians understand New Rochelle's specific wildlife patterns and building structures, from Tudor-style homes in Wykagyl to waterfront properties along Echo Bay. We offer comprehensive solutions including humane trapping, permanent exclusion, and full attic restoration with transparent pricing and guaranteed results.
localContext: New Rochelle's tree-lined streets, proximity to parks like Glen Island and Hudson Park, and abundance of pre-war homes with accessible eaves create ideal conditions for squirrel infestations. The city's mix of single-family residences, co-ops near North Avenue, and historic properties in the Pinebrook neighborhood all require specialized squirrel control approaches that our team expertly provides.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in New Rochelle typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether attic cleanup or damage repair is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before starting any work.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my New Rochelle attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the morning and evening, visible entry holes near roof lines or soffits, chewed wiring or insulation, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels repeatedly entering and exiting your roof area. Many New Rochelle homes have squirrel activity due to the abundance of oak and maple trees.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Squirrels are safely trapped and relocated according to Westchester County guidelines. We never use poison or harmful methods, and we prioritize exclusion techniques to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my New Rochelle home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout New Rochelle and can typically begin trapping immediately. Most squirrel removal projects are completed within 3-7 days, followed by permanent exclusion work to seal all entry points and prevent re-entry. Emergency services are available for urgent situations.
